Off Calendar Jan-21-2014 Continued To Apr-02-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-08-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: JOHN HILLSMAN, ESQ., 415.531.7136, FOR PLAINTIFF BERNARDA LIGGETT.
ANDREW PORT, ESQ., 415.227.9455, FOR DEFENDANT SAUSE BROS, INC.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling: DEFENDANT SAUSE BROS, INCORPORATED'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is overruled. Plaintiff may maintain the unseaworthiness/loss of consortium cause of action under the reasoning of Barrette v. Jubilee Fisheries, Inc. (WD Wa. 2011) 2011 U.S. Dist. Lexis 89514. Order signed in open court. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Tony Vaughn, CSR #6185

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-09-2013 Continued To Jan-08-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT SAUSE BROS, INC.'S GENERAL DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is continued on the Court's own motion to January 8, 2014. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =302/MJM
